news.title:
BPCL faces a ₹1,816.65 crore excise demand; plans to appeal to CESTAT. Chalet Hotels to invest ₹632.8 crore for a luxury hotel in Hyderabad by FY2029.
Lupin gets EU approval for its biosimilar Ranluspec. Concor, HFCL, NBCC, and Waaree Energies announce key projects across logistics, telecom, construction, and solar sectors.
news.summary:
BPCL faces a ₹1,816.65 crore excise demand; plans to appeal to CESTAT. Chalet Hotels to invest ₹632.8 crore for a luxury hotel in Hyderabad by FY2029.
Lupin gets EU approval for its biosimilar Ranluspec. Concor, HFCL, NBCC, and Waaree Energies announce key projects across logistics, telecom, construction, and solar sectors.

news.title:
HFCL joins IIT Delhi consortium for hollow core fiber tech, aiding 6G, quantum networks, ultra-low latency.
Hollow core fiber cuts latency and energy use; HFCL offers manufacturing and validation support.
news.summary:
HFCL joins IIT Delhi consortium for hollow core fiber tech, aiding 6G, quantum networks, ultra-low latency.
Hollow core fiber cuts latency and energy use; HFCL offers manufacturing and validation support.

news.title:
HFCL issued Rs. 50 Cr corporate guarantees for HTL's loans.
HTL, 74%-owned by HFCL, produces optical fiber cables.
news.summary:
HFCL issued Rs. 50 Cr corporate guarantees for HTL's loans.
HTL, 74%-owned by HFCL, produces optical fiber cables.

news.title: HFCL secures a significant order worth ₹605.9M, enhancing its market position.
news.summary: HFCL secures a significant order worth ₹605.9M, enhancing its market position.

news.title:
HFCL Ltd secured a USD 4.67M export order for optical fiber cables.
The order is to be executed by May 2026 for an international client.
news.summary:
HFCL Ltd secured a USD 4.67M export order for optical fiber cables.
The order is to be executed by May 2026 for an international client.

news.title:
HFCL Ltd's Q3 FY26 revenue reached ₹1210.8 cr, a 20% QoQ growth. OFC contributes 48% of revenue.
Export share rose to 27% YoY. Progress in defence segment, capacity expansions, and ESG initiatives highlighted.
news.summary:
HFCL Ltd's Q3 FY26 revenue reached ₹1210.8 cr, a 20% QoQ growth. OFC contributes 48% of revenue.
Export share rose to 27% YoY. Progress in defence segment, capacity expansions, and ESG initiatives highlighted.

news.title:
India's telecom exports gain edge post India-US trade deal lowering tariffs from 50% to 18%.
Key exporters like Himachal Futuristic and Sterlite Tech may benefit from enhanced competitiveness.
news.summary:
India's telecom exports gain edge post India-US trade deal lowering tariffs from 50% to 18%.
Key exporters like Himachal Futuristic and Sterlite Tech may benefit from enhanced competitiveness.

news.title: HFCL reported consolidated Q3 net profit of 976M INR, up from 737M YoY.
news.summary: HFCL reported consolidated Q3 net profit of 976M INR, up from 737M YoY.

news.title:
HFCL Ltd to host Q3FY26 earnings call on Feb 3, 2026, at 4:30 PM IST.
Call will discuss unaudited results for Q3 and 9 months; audio and transcript to be shared.
news.summary:
HFCL Ltd to host Q3FY26 earnings call on Feb 3, 2026, at 4:30 PM IST.
Call will discuss unaudited results for Q3 and 9 months; audio and transcript to be shared.

news.title:
HFCL and ITI deploy India-made routers for BharatNet project.
India's router market is US-dominated after restrictions on Chinese gear.
news.summary:
HFCL and ITI deploy India-made routers for BharatNet project.
India's router market is US-dominated after restrictions on Chinese gear.

news.title:
US tariffs have hurt Indian cable and telecom firms like Sterlite Tech, HFCL, Polycab, Havells, and RR Kabel, impacting margins and exports amid a US data centre boom.
Companies aim to mitigate tariffs by localizing production or diversifying markets; demand remains strong in the US for data centres and broadband infrastructure.
news.summary:
US tariffs have hurt Indian cable and telecom firms like Sterlite Tech, HFCL, Polycab, Havells, and RR Kabel, impacting margins and exports amid a US data centre boom.
Companies aim to mitigate tariffs by localizing production or diversifying markets; demand remains strong in the US for data centres and broadband infrastructure.

news.title:
HFCL Ltd's board approved a QIP of equity shares at a floor price of ₹65.84/share.
Trading window for designated persons closed from Nov 18 to Dec 28, 2025, for the issue.
news.summary:
HFCL Ltd's board approved a QIP of equity shares at a floor price of ₹65.84/share.
Trading window for designated persons closed from Nov 18 to Dec 28, 2025, for the issue.

news.title:
HFCL Ltd plans to sell 2.17M shares in Nivetti Systems.
Sale completion rescheduled from Dec 15, 2025, to Mar 15, 2026.
news.summary:
HFCL Ltd plans to sell 2.17M shares in Nivetti Systems.
Sale completion rescheduled from Dec 15, 2025, to Mar 15, 2026.

news.title:
HFCL shares dropped 3.95% to ₹66.30 despite a $73M export order for optical fiber cables.
The stock hit a 52-week low, down 48% YoY, with YTD decline of 41.9% amid market concerns.
news.summary:
HFCL shares dropped 3.95% to ₹66.30 despite a $73M export order for optical fiber cables.
The stock hit a 52-week low, down 48% YoY, with YTD decline of 41.9% amid market concerns.

news.title:
HFCL Ltd's subsidiary secured export orders for optical fiber cables.
The order from a global client will be completed by Nov 2026.
news.summary:
HFCL Ltd's subsidiary secured export orders for optical fiber cables.
The order from a global client will be completed by Nov 2026.

news.title:
Kotak Mahindra Mutual Fund acquired 0.5% stake in HFCL at Rs 78.45/share for Rs 58.8 crore; HFCL shares rose 5.5% to Rs 78.3.
Varanium Capital Advisors bought stakes in Annapurna Swadisht (1.05%) and Jay Bee Laminations (0.6%); Annapurna shares rose 6.3%.
news.summary:
Kotak Mahindra Mutual Fund acquired 0.5% stake in HFCL at Rs 78.45/share for Rs 58.8 crore; HFCL shares rose 5.5% to Rs 78.3.
Varanium Capital Advisors bought stakes in Annapurna Swadisht (1.05%) and Jay Bee Laminations (0.6%); Annapurna shares rose 6.3%.

news.title:
HFCL Ltd announces virtual investor meet on Nov 3, 2025, hosted by Arihant Capital.
Meeting to discuss business updates, industry insights; info available on HFCL's website.
news.summary:
HFCL Ltd announces virtual investor meet on Nov 3, 2025, hosted by Arihant Capital.
Meeting to discuss business updates, industry insights; info available on HFCL's website.

news.title:
HFCL Ltd Q2 FY26 revenue INR 1043.3 Cr; EBITDA margin 19.5%.
Expanding OFC capacity to 19.01m fkm p.a. by June 2026; INR 650 Cr export orders.
news.summary:
HFCL Ltd Q2 FY26 revenue INR 1043.3 Cr; EBITDA margin 19.5%.
Expanding OFC capacity to 19.01m fkm p.a. by June 2026; INR 650 Cr export orders.

news.title:
NSE to exclude Cyient, HFCL, NCC, Titagarh Rail from F&O segment by Jan 2026.
Existing F&O contracts valid till Dec 2025; no new contracts post-expiry.
news.summary:
NSE to exclude Cyient, HFCL, NCC, Titagarh Rail from F&O segment by Jan 2026.
Existing F&O contracts valid till Dec 2025; no new contracts post-expiry.

news.title:
HFCL invests heavily in a new facility in Andhra, targeting defense sector growth.
Company sees significant potential in the defense industry for future expansion.
news.summary:
